words.context: A syllable is a part of a word that usually has one vowel sound. For example, the word innovative has four syllables.
The adjective is syllabic. Syllabic.
A syllabary is a set of written symbols for syllables in a language. Today there are very few languages which have syllabic writing and a syllabary.

words.russian: делить на слоги, деление на слоге
words.context: To syllabify means to divide a word into syllables. So let's syllabify the word innovative. And you get four syllables.

The noun, which translates into Russian as слоговая азбука, is syllabary. Let's continue with the verb, глагол, to syllabify. To syllabify translates into Russian as делить на слоге. And the noun, деление на слоге, translates into English as syllabification.

A hyphen is a small punctuation mark, a small line used to join words or parts of words together. To hyphenate means to use a hyphen to join words in order to create compound words, compound nouns or compound adjectives, for example, high school.
The verb «to hyphenate» translates into Russian as «ставить дефис». Listen and repeat. Hyphenate.

words.russian: дефисное написание, расстановка переносов или же использование дефисов
words.context: And the noun is hyphenation. A hyphen is a small punctuation mark, a small line used to join words or parts of words together.

A dash is a punctuation mark used to separate parts of a sentence or to show a range of objects or numbers. Unlike the hyphen, it is not used to create compound words, like when we add two words together to create a compound noun or adjective such as bluish green.

The long dash is called an M dash. And the short dash is called an N dash. The long dash, the M dash, is used to indicate breaks between two parts of a sentence or to introduce additional information in a sentence.
The short dash, the N dash, is as wide as the letter N in a particular typeface. So it's slightly longer than a hyphen. And it is used to show ranges of numbers or connections between words.
And there's a verb to dash. Which means to move very quickly, to run. A dash is a punctuation mark used to separate parts of a sentence or to show a range of objects or numbers.
And innovation is a new idea, method, or invention that improves something.
And the adjective innovative means using new and creative ideas, original and modern.
Innovatory is a synonym for innovative.
To invent means to create or design something new that did not exist before.
Inventive is an adjective. Inventive ideas are good at thinking of new and clever ideas.
Inventive is a synonym for imaginative.
To discover means to find or learn about something for the first time.
The noun is a discovery. Discovery.
So it's able to be discovered. Discoverable.
And something that has not been discovered yet is undiscovered. Undiscovered is an adjective.
A breakthrough is an important new discovery or development that solves a problem or changes the way we think, an advance, an achievement, some progress.
The phrasal verb to break through means to achieve success, especially after difficulty, to succeed, to overcome, to go higher than a particular level.
A concept translates into Russian as концепция, понятие, идея.

The difference between a concept and conception is that a concept is an idea or principle about something. It's a general or widely accepted notion, so it's objective. Whereas a conception is the way someone understands or thinks about something. It's one's personal understanding or belief about something.
The adjective conceptual translates as conceptual and the adverb is conceptually.
Please write down the noun scholar, a scholar. It's spelled as s-c-h-o-l-a-r.
And write down the adjective scholarly. The spelling is s-c-h-o-l-a-r-l-y.
A physicist. A physicist translates into Russian as physique.
A physician translates into Russian as vrach, vrach-terapet, doctor.
The scholarly discipline which studies the psyche is called psychology. Listen and repeat. Psychology.
The adjective is psychological. Psychological.
Scholars who study psychology are called psychologists. Psychologists study the human mind and human emotions and behavior and how different situations have an effect on people.
To educate means to teach or train someone, to instruct, to tutor.
The noun is education, education, and the adjective is educational, educational.
The noun is education, education, and the adjective is educational, educational.
An approach, which translates into Russian as подход, is a way or method of doing something.
A good synonym for an approach is a strategy or a method.
The verb to approach means to come near or nearer to something or someone, to move closer, to reach.
The train is approaching the station. Here is another example with approach as a noun.
The word approach is usually followed by the preposition to and approach to something.
Some good synonyms for pioneering are innovative, original, groundbreaking.
The verb to pioneer means to be the first to develop or use something new, to open up new areas.
And the adjective pioneering means involving new ideas or methods.
Some good synonyms for pioneering are innovative, original, groundbreaking.
An author is a person who writes a book, an article or any other kind of text.
A co-author is a person who writes a text together with one or more other authors.
Renowned means famous or well-known for something, celebrated, honored, acclaimed, also prominent.
The spelling is p-r-o-m-i-n-e-n-t. Write down the translation.
an artificial satellite is a device sent up into space to travel through space.
The first artificial satellite to orbit Earth called Sputnik 1 was successfully launched on the 4th of October in 1957 as part of the Soviet space program.
A scaffold is a temporary wooden or metal platform used to support workers and materials during construction or repair.
The method of teaching in the Zone of Proximal Development, Zone of the nearest development, in other words, teaching in the ZPD.
Satnavs are devices which receive wireless signals from the satellite to provide GPS navigation.
The first generally accepted version of the periodic table was published in 1869.
Non-Euclidean geometry is a branch of mathematics which explores shapes and spaces on curved surfaces.
Another expression for non-Euclidean geometry is hyperbolic geometry.
Lobachevsky's first treatise on hyperbolic geometry was published in the Kazan messenger in 1829.

A neutrino is an elementary subatomic particle, which is much smaller than an electron, with no electric charge and a very small mass. It interacts very weakly with matter, allowing these particles to pass through most objects.
The neutrino particle. It translates into Russian as частица нейтрина. It's a particle which is smaller than an electron.
To decipher means to find the meaning of something that is difficult to read or understand. Some good synonyms for to decipher are to decode or to interpret.
To predict patterns. Which translates into Russian as предсказывать закономерности. Scientists predict patterns in climate change to understand future weather.

To found means to start or establish something new like a company or organization. The founder of this system, Konstantin Dmitrievich Ushinsky, believed that education should be compulsory for everyone, including peasants, girls and women.
A founder is a person who starts or establishes something new. The spelling of founder is f-o-u-n-d-e-r. Write down the translation. Основатель.

To publish means to prepare and make a book, article, or other work available to the public. In 1952, Yuri Knorozov published a paper called Ancient Writing of Central America, where he explained his method for deciphering ancient languages based on positional statistics.
The noun publication translates as публикация. And the adjective unpublished translates as неопубликованный. Finally, unpublished means not made public or not yet printed.

words.russian: статья, научная статья, академическая статья, научная работа или публикация
words.context: An article translates into Russian as статья. A scientific article translates into Russian as научная статья. And a synonymous expression is a scholarly article.
A theory is a set of ideas or principles that explain something.
A theorem is a proven statement in mathematics based on previously accepted facts.
The combination of vowels eo are pronounced as a diphthong ea, theoretical, theoretical.
A theorist is a person who develops or studies theories.
To theorize means to form ideas or explanations about something. The verb to theorize translates into Russian as теоретизировать, строить теорию.

words.english: at the turn of the 21st century
words.russian: на рубеже веков, на рубеже тысячелетий
words.context: At the turn of the 21st century. At the turn of is pronounced as a single word. Use connected speech.
Hundreds. The seventeen hundreds. In the eighteen hundreds.
In the nineteen hundreds means from the year nineteen hundred to nineteen ten.
In the two thousands. In the two thousands means during the first decade of the 21st century.
In the beginning of the 1990s. Or the 2000s.
In the late 1990s. In the late 2000s.
In the mid-2020s means halfway through the decade. Around the year 2025.
A chemical is a substance used or produced by a reaction involving changes to atoms or molecules.
The noun chemist translates into Russian as a chemical. Please repeat. A chemist.
Finally, the scientific discipline is called chemistry. Please repeat. A chemistry.
A property or a quality translates into Russian as свойства или характеристика.
The humanities. The spelling is H-U-M-A-N-I-T-I-E-S. The humanities.
Beyond can be either a preposition or an adverb. Beyond means further away in the distance than something, outside or after a stated limit. Beyond за пределами.
